body:
commit 1: Add comment "(depth resolved)" to appropriate variables in define_diagnostics. 
commit 2: Add optional argument for soil (EnergyHydrology) model default diagnostics.

To find the variables with depth I did:
```jl
julia> import ClimaAnalysis as cl
julia> dir = cl.SimDir(".")
julia> for short_name in cl.available_vars(dir)
           var = get(dir; short_name);
           depth = cl.has_altitude(var);
           if depth == true 
               println(short_name, " = ", depth)
           end
       end
sco2 = true
soc = true
swp = true
scms = true
swc = true
sie = true
scd = true
tsoil = true
stc = true
shc = true
si = true
```
title: Diagnostics comment: depth resolved
